title: Prioritize Direct Label Identification
description: When a visual element is explicitly labeled, use that label as the primary source for identification.
content: Locate any text directly labeling the visual component in question within the chart. This explicit label provides the most reliable information for matching with the given options.

title: Systematically Differentiate by Visual Cues
description: Evaluate all options by cross-referencing their descriptions with specific visual characteristics in the chart.
content: Observe distinct visual attributes such as color, bar style (solid vs. dashed), or positioning for each option. Use these precise cues to confirm the correct answer and confidently eliminate distractors.
